note: Added TestReviewFixClaudeACPPathIsWriteStageWithModelSpec in internal/app/agent_attempt_transport_test.go (after line 138). The test runs `review fix run --agent claude` with model=claude-sonnet-4/effort=high, then asserts ReadOnly=false, non-nil WritePathAllowed, correct ModelSpec, and no CLI Command/Args on the descriptor — covering all four dimensions the finding identified as untested.

Updated docs/agents.md in four places: (1) built-in agents table now shows ACP transport and '(no CLI command)' for claude instead of `claude -p --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions`; (2) reviewer-role sentence now says read-only is enforced by the ACP client, not via `claude -p --output-format json`; (3) name-resolution section now documents ANTHROPIC_MODEL/CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL env vars for claude instead of --model/--effort CLI flags; (4) idle-timeout completion paragraph removes the dead 'claude's final result envelope with is_error: false' CLI marker; (5) review-fix section now says claude runs over ACP with ReadOnly=false instead of 'uses the executor command with --dangerously-skip-permissions'.
